description: This file defines the Offcanvas component for Bootstrap, implementing the offcanvas UI element with methods for showing, hiding, toggling, and managing related events and behaviors.

classes.name: Offcanvas
classes.description: A class extending BaseComponent that manages the offcanvas UI component, including show, hide, toggle, and event handling logic.

methods.name: toggle
methods.description: Toggles the visibility of the offcanvas element.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Displays the offcanvas element, triggers show events, and manages focus and backdrop.

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Hides the offcanvas element, triggers hide events, and manages focus and backdrop.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Cleans up the component, removing event listeners and disposing of backdrop and focus trap.

methods.name: _initializeBackDrop
methods.description: Initializes the backdrop component with appropriate settings and click callback.

methods.name: _initializeFocusTrap
methods.description: Initializes the focus trap for accessibility.

methods.name: _addEventListeners
methods.description: Adds keydown event listener for dismissing the offcanvas with Escape key.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: Enables jQuery-style invocation of the component methods.
